data.name: customSqlQuery1.Sql
data.value:
SELECT tab.* FROM (
select sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control , pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name( sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control ) as group_control_name , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename||sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_name||' '||sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_surname as member_name , sc_mem_m_share_mem.period_recrieve as share_period , sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_amount / 10 as share_amount , sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock , sc_mem_m_share_mem.drop_status
, nvl((select sum(total_interest) from sc_lon_m_loan_card , sc_lon_m_rule where membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_type and principal_balance <> 0 and invest_status = '0' ),0) as interest_arrear
, (select sum(principal_balance) from sc_lon_m_loan_card , sc_lon_m_rule where sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_type and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code = '01' and principal_balance <> 0 and invest_status = '0' ) as emer_balance
, (select sum(principal_balance) from sc_lon_m_loan_card , sc_lon_m_rule where sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_type and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code = '02' and principal_balance <> 0 and invest_status = '0' ) as norm_balance
, (select sum(principal_balance) from sc_lon_m_loan_card , sc_lon_m_rule where sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_type and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code = '03' and principal_balance <> 0 and invest_status = '0' ) as spec_balance
, (select sum(period_payment_amount) from sc_lon_m_loan_card , sc_lon_m_rule , sc_lon_m_contract where sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_type and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code = '01' and sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no and principal_balance <> 0 and invest_status = '0' ) as emer_period
, (select sum(period_payment_amount) from sc_lon_m_loan_card , sc_lon_m_rule , sc_lon_m_contract where sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_type and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code = '02' and sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no and principal_balance <> 0 and invest_status = '0' ) as norm_period
, (select sum(period_payment_amount) from sc_lon_m_loan_card , sc_lon_m_rule , sc_lon_m_contract where sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_type and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code = '03' and sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no and principal_balance <> 0 and invest_status = '0' ) as spec_period
, nvl((select sum(principal_balance) from sc_lon_m_loan_card , sc_lon_m_rule where membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_type and invest_status = '0' ),0) as all_balance
, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sysdate , 'SD MONTH YYYY') as sys_tdate
from sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_m_ucf_prename , sc_mem_m_share_mem , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group where sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no and sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename_code = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.prename_code and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code = '0' /*WHERE*/ --and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no between '001001' and '001001'
) tab WHERE share_stock + all_balance <> 0 /*ยังเป็นสมาชิก และทุนเรือนหุ้น + หนี้ มากกว่า 0*/
UNION
SELECT tab.* FROM (
select sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control , pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name( sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control ) as group_control_name , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename||sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_name||' '||sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_surname as member_name , sc_mem_m_share_mem.period_recrieve as share_period , sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_amount / 10 as share_amount , sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock , sc_mem_m_share_mem.drop_status
, nvl((select sum(total_interest) from sc_lon_m_loan_card , sc_lon_m_rule where membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_type and principal_balance <> 0 and invest_status = '0' ),0) as interest_arrear
, (select sum(principal_balance) from sc_lon_m_loan_card , sc_lon_m_rule where sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_type and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code = '01' and principal_balance <> 0 and invest_status = '0' ) as emer_balance
, (select sum(principal_balance) from sc_lon_m_loan_card , sc_lon_m_rule where sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_type and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code = '02' and principal_balance <> 0 and invest_status = '0' ) as norm_balance
, (select sum(principal_balance) from sc_lon_m_loan_card , sc_lon_m_rule where sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_type and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code = '03' and principal_balance <> 0 and invest_status = '0' ) as spec_balance
, (select sum(period_payment_amount) from sc_lon_m_loan_card , sc_lon_m_rule , sc_lon_m_contract where sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_type and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code = '01' and sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no and principal_balance <> 0 and invest_status = '0' ) as emer_period
, (select sum(period_payment_amount) from sc_lon_m_loan_card , sc_lon_m_rule , sc_lon_m_contract where sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_type and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code = '02' and sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no and principal_balance <> 0 and invest_status = '0' ) as norm_period
, (select sum(period_payment_amount) from sc_lon_m_loan_card , sc_lon_m_rule , sc_lon_m_contract where sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_type and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code = '03' and sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no and principal_balance <> 0 and invest_status = '0' ) as spec_period
, nvl((select sum(principal_balance) from sc_lon_m_loan_card , sc_lon_m_rule where membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_type and invest_status = '0' ),0) as all_balance
, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sysdate , 'SD MONTH YYYY') as sys_tdate
from sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_m_ucf_prename , sc_mem_m_share_mem , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group where sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no and sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename_code = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.prename_code and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code = '3' /*WHERE*/ --and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no between '001001' and '001001' order by sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no
) tab WHERE all_balance <> 0 /*ลาออกแล้ว แต่หนี้ มากกว่า 0*/
